channel.title: Governance-as-Code on UPDSS — Universal Product Development Support System
channel.description: Recent content in Governance-as-Code on UPDSS — Universal Product Development Support System

item.title: Governance-as-Code: How UPDSS Governs AI Agents Building Production Software
item.description: A detailed technical walkthrough of UPDSS — a governance-as-code platform for AI-agent-driven software development. Architecture, enforcement thesis, multi-agent orchestration, and real-world operational lessons from 50+ releases.
